name: Grey Wilcox 》ALT
description:
He got kicked out of his house and your mom picked him up like some stray.

Now he's staying in the guest room in your basement and scaring you half to death in the middle of the night.

tw: shitty parental behavior, bullying, typical warnings for Grey including his thoughts of violence toward his bullies.

This one was supposed to be purely self-indulgent, but I thought we needed a little of our best boy Grey.

So have another alt!

Basically, his dad kicked him out and your mom found him sleeping in the laundry mat when she went to do some laundry. Your mom is a good mom, so she brought him home and let him stay in the guest room in the basement.

He didn't know this was your house though.

What's your role? You're in the popular group in school, except you're kind to him. Also has crushing on you hard.

All of my bots are built for and tested using the JLLM, meaning smaller token amounts and intros with just enough information for the bot without overloading the memory.

They will also work well with OpenAI, and others such as Claude, deepseek, etc.

Please remember that the site is in beta, and so is the JLLM. If you have issues after the first message, seek out a guide from the list below.

↠absolutetrash's jailbreak↞

↠iorveths' JLLM for dummies↞

↠AvenRose's LLM guide↞
